description: CompositionBlue half sleeves shirt made of 100% cotton, has checks with different colour accents, two pockets on either chest with brand name appliquéd above the left one, brand badge appliquéd on the left sleeve, a full length buttoned packet and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash careMachine wash in cold water inside out using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishmentsChecks that add immense style to your casual look is what lee brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and funky footwear for casual looks.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 6'; Shoulder: 18"
